TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Paudadan{Ś§ßŚĺ∑ÔĻôŚ∑īÁÉŹśčČŤóćÔĻöťÉ®ŤźĹ} = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Sincungsyang ka alang Paudadan. 254 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 727 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 72% niqan 526 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 28% niqan 201 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis48%, Sakizaya 1%, Bunun 4%, Tayal 4%, Truku 12%, Kebalan 1%, ni rahuq na o 3%.
S.PHON: = paudadan{**********} = gaga mniq ńßwa…ĺ…ôs…ôn sin ¶uŇčsjaŇč ka alaŇč paudadan. *** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, amis**%, saki*aja *%, bunun *%, tajal *%, t…ĺuku **%, k…ôbalan *%, ni …ĺańßuq na o *%.
S.FORM: = Paudadan{Ś§ßŚĺ∑ÔĻôŚ∑īÁÉŹśčČŤóćÔĻöťÉ®ŤźĹ} = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Sincungsyang ka alang Paudadan. 254 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 727 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 72% niqan 526 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 28% niqan 201 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis48%, Sakizaya 1%, Bunun 4%, Tayal 4%, Truku 12%, Kebalan 1%, ni rahuq na o 3%.
